training.loss_notes: default CrossEntropyLoss over flattened target-gene classes

artifact_usage_claims.usage: defines the official K562 DEG task contract and exact 6640 target-gene prediction problem
source-backed target-gene order used by the node-local target-aware factor head

pipeline_program.perturbation_side: AIDOcell_100M_essential_K562_D640 + GNN_Simple_Official_D256 input features inherited from parent root
pipeline_program.target_side: official target_genes.tsv order encoded as deterministic target identity/order features plus learned target factors
pipeline_program.fusion: context rank logits x target rank factors
pipeline_program.prior: official target gene order only; no STRING_GNN checkpoint or scFoundation artifact used
pipeline_program.head: residual context encoder with target-gene-aware low-rank bilinear class head
pipeline_program.training_strategy: weighted cross entropy inherited from base config
pipeline_program.fine_tuning: node-local head and context encoder only
pipeline_program.paper_alignment: target-gene-aware prediction head over the official 6640 K562 targets
